description: Search file contents with a regex pattern. Returns JSON array of matches: [{"file": "...", "line": N, "content": "..."}, ...]. Supports file_pattern (glob, e.g. '*.go') to filter by filename, path to limit search to a subdirectory, and limit (max matches, default 200). Example: {"pattern": "func.*Handler", "file_pattern": "*.go", "path": "./src"}
name: grep

file_pattern.description: Optional glob pattern to filter by filename (e.g. '*.go', '*_test.go')

path.description: Subdirectory to search in (relative to work dir). Defaults to whole project

limit.description: Max matches (default 200, capped at 1000). Set 0 for unlimited
